  0x%08X %s,\n
 %u:0x%08X,
 (%d %d %d)
 (%s verts, %s faces, %s edges)
 (%s verts, %s tris, %s nodes)
 (late-bound)
 (to %.2f in %.2fs)
 - <b>Persists</b><i>(that's expensive)</i>
 - Found
 - Lost
 /*%u:0x%08X*/ "%s",
 <font color="cyan">Query</font>(
 Bodies/Shapes - Static(%i/%i) Dynamic(%i/%i) Keyframed(%i/%i)\n
 CollGroup=%d;
 SIMD
 Shape(
 both sides of collision in the same hierarchy must have self-collision and solid contacts enabled. Intersection disabled.
 with collision disabled. Do Not Collide.
 with collision enabled
 {%d,%d,%d}
#<Undefined
#This file is generated by CHullIVR::SaveObj() from CPolygonMesh with %d vertices, %d faces\n
%.3f behind, %d nodes, FeModel %s bytes, %s\n
%14s %-30s[%u]%s\n
%d bones found and initialized\n
%d sec to find %d material files\n
%d verts, %d polys}
%d verts, %d tris}
%d+%d layers excluded
%s %f %f %f %f %f %f %f %f %f\n
%s %g %g %g %g %g %g %g %g %g\n
%s %s included in target detail layer '%s' of %s
%s (Color)
%s (Material)
%s 0x%llX - 0x%llX, except %s\n
%s 0x%llX\n
%s F=%d V=%d hE=%d
%s NameIndex:AcquirePreindexedName( %x ) without name string\n
%s could not allocate (pre-acquire) name '%s'. It was expected to be #%d. %d names already used.\n
%s does not include FCOLLISION_FUNC_ENABLE_TOUCH_EVENT. Disabling all touch events.
%s has FCOLLISION_FUNC_ENABLE_TOUCH_PERSISTS. Adding persistent touch events.
%s(): Bone referenced by collision mesh not found in render skeleton. Skipping collision mesh.\n
%s_color
%s_matgrp
&\tV_frexpf
( + %d more)
(%.4g,%.4g)
*?333?8
, Fully Rigid
-----------------\nObject: %s\n
-aggs
-cloth
-mem

-touch
